name: German Meat Balls (Koenigsberger Klops)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all meatball ingredients together, adding the beaten egg whites last. Form into balls.
2. In a large pot, boil the first six sauce ingredients (water, onion, bay leaves, sugar, and the combined allspice & peppercorns) for 30 minutes. Strain the liquid.
3. Bring the strained liquid to a boil, then add the meatballs. Simmer for 15 minutes. Remove the meatballs from the pot and keep them hot on a serving platter.
4. Add vinegar to the sauce. Dissolve flour in a small amount of cold water, then gradually stir it into the beaten yolks.
5. Slowly incorporate this thickening mixture into the seasoned sauce while stirring constantly until smooth and thick.
6. Pour the sauce over the meatballs and garnish with lemon slices and capers.
